mapper.select: SELECT id, tag_code, tag_name, time_dimension, timeliness, physical_level FROM biz_data.tag_info WHERE deleted = false

SELECT id, tag_code, tag_name, time_dimension, timeliness, physical_level FROM biz_data.tag_info WHERE deleted = false AND tag_code = #{tag} AND physical_level = #{physicalLevel} AND timeliness = #{timeliness}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO asset_lineage_metrics_un_tmp ( id, metric_name, metric_code, dimension, physical_level, timeliness, api_url, creator, create_time, updater, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.metricName}, #{item.metricCode}, #{item.dimension}, #{item.physicalLevel}, #{item.timeliness}, #{item.apiUrl}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updater}, #{item.updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, metric_name AS metricName, metric_code AS metricCode, dimension, physical_level AS physicalLevel, timeliness, api_url AS apiUrl, creator, create_time AS createTime, updater, update_time AS updateTime FROM asset_lineage_metrics_un_tmp
